notes: CodificationSection, , , accorded Sergeant at Arms of Senate the same priority as executive agencies under the Surplus Property Act of 1944, , . The Surplus Property Act of 1944, which was formerly classified principally to sections 1611 to 1646 of the former Appendix to Title 50, War and National Defense, was repealed, with certain exceptions, by , , and the priorities thereunder expired .
